title: Big Globe - L_Ender's Cataclysm Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-l-enders-cataclysm-compatibility)

Needs [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), A compatibility mod/datapack for [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))

Some screenshots:
![Frosted Prison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e68e5657b09643e1f40eaf1cea2ed9fabcd526_0.webp)

![Cursed Pyramid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06e0062cb545269aa206ac5f6c16b8cf24bf880_0.webp)

![Soul Blacksmith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39afecaeca8cb5d144ad5604fbc9367635b39a7b_0.webp)
